Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class RevokePermissionRequest.ObjectType

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.RevokePermissionRequest.ObjectType
Enclosing class:
RevokePermissionRequest
public static final class RevokePermissionRequest.ObjectType extends Object
A set of string constants for the RevokePermissionRequest parameter objectType.

The type of object being revoked.
